title: Snow Cannon
body:
## **Hi!**

This Mod implements a Snow Cannon as weapon!

This cannon uses snowballs as ammunition, which can be fired with the right mouse button. To fire in burst mode, simply hold down the button. The projectiles travel at an astonishing speed and, on contact with a block, explode creating particles, creating a dynamic visual effect.

![Wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7020489c76560147b63acf85a14975146a34571e.png)

## **Enjoy!**
